display.purpose: Name 'TangTang' — the single biggest text on the page.

label.purpose: Attribution lines, stack tags. Never in nav or headings.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for iUp entrance and state transitions.

motion.name: iup-initial-delay
motion.purpose: Delay before iUp cascade begins on page load.

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Pill-shaped navigation link. Orange fill on active state only.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: inline-block; padding: 8px 20px; border-radius: 9999px; color: #ffffff; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.9rem; background: transparent; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); } .ds-nav-link.active { background: #FF4906; color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Primary Button / CTA
components.description: Orange accent button — used sparingly, max one per screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; padding: 10px 28px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #FF4906; color: #ffffff; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, transform 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #ff6630; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Ghost Back Link
components.description: Transparent pill with hairline border — used for back navigation on inner pages.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-block; padding: 10px 28px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.9rem; background: transparent; transition: background 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Avatar Circle
components.description: 120px circle with 3D flip on hover. Click triggers WeChat modal.
components.css: .ds-avatar { width: 120px; height: 120px; border-radius: 9999px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(255,255,255,0.5), 0 2px 20px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.25); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.3s ease; } .ds-avatar:hover { transform: scale(1.04); } .ds-avatar img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }

components.name: Inner Page Container
components.description: Centered dark container for Blog, Resume, About placeholder pages.
components.html:
博客

即将上线

← 返回首页
components.css: .ds-inner-page { min-height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #1a1a2e; padding: 40px 20px; text-align: center; } .ds-inner-title { font-size: clamp(2rem, 6vw, 3.5rem); font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; margin-bottom: 16px; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-inner-desc { font-size: 1rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); margin-bottom: 40px; }

narrative.overview:
This system is built on the conviction that technical identity should feel as precise as the code it represents. Dark surfaces absorb attention and push content forward; every element earns its place through function and contrast, not decoration.

The palette speaks quietly but confidently: deep-space darks, clean whites, and one sharp signal color — Kuaishou orange — reserved for the single most important moment on any screen.

This system explicitly rejects over-engineered portfolio aesthetics: no particle systems, no CSS gradients pretending to be 'futuristic', no glassmorphism on glassmorphism.
keyCharacteristics: Single accent color (Kuaishou orange) used sparingly
White text hierarchy with opacity-stepped supporting text
Monospace labels for technical context only
Cascaded entrance animations — purposeful, never idle

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Kuaishou orange (#FF4906) appears on at most one element per screen. It is a signal, not a theme.

rules.name: The Overlay Calibration Rule
rules.body: The wallpaper overlay must keep the wallpaper visible as texture (~40% bleed-through). If the overlay reads as solid black, it is too dark.

rules.name: The Mono Boundary Rule
rules.body: Source Code Pro is used exclusively for technical metadata. Never in navigation, headings, or body prose.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow on nav items, cards, or containers at rest. Hover states may use a subtle background fill — never a shadow.

dos: Do use Kuaishou orange (#FF4906) on exactly one interactive element per screen.
Do use clamp() for all display and headline sizes.
Do use monospace exclusively for technical metadata and attribution.
Do include @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) for every animation.
Do cascade entrance animations with 150ms stagger.
Do keep body line length at ≤65ch.
donts: Don't use particle effects, CSS noise textures, or animated gradients.
Don't use a white or light background on any page.
Don't use glassmorphism as a design feature.
Don't put Kuaishou orange on more than one element per screen.
Don't use monospace font in navigation or headings.
Don't animate CSS layout properties — only transform and opacity.
Don't build a white-background page for any route.
Don't add more than 3 items to the main navigation.
